description_long: This is a low-profile athletic shoe with a predominantly dark gray body and red accents along the collar, heel, and toe areas. The shoe features a white lace-up closure with a standard criss-cross lacing style, and the laces are threaded through metal eyelets. On the outer side, there is a gold-colored logo and text, adding a touch of branding detail. The upper material appears to be a combination of synthetic leather and fabric, while the sole is likely made of flexible rubber, designed for comfort and grip. The interior is lined with a soft, red material for added comfort. The overall design is sleek and streamlined, suitable for casual or light athletic use in urban environments.
description: A sleek, low-profile athletic shoe with a dark gray body, red accents, and white laces, featuring a gold logo on the side. The shoe is designed for comfort and style, with a flexible rubber sole and soft interior lining.
description_view_0: Side view showing the gold logo, red accents, and the full lace-up closure.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the white laces, toe shape, and red trim along the tongue and toe.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the smooth, uninterrupted gray surface and red collar, without visible branding.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the heel's red accent and the shoe's low-cut design.
attribute_logo: gold script and Olympic rings on the outer side near the laces
